page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Detects likely chimeras in pcr amplified dna
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A chimeric sequence detection utility, compatible with near-full length Sanger sequences and shorter 454-FLX sequences. It involves the different series of steps that operate to flag chimeric 16S rRNA sequences.To run it, you need NAST-formatted sequences generated by the included NAST-iEr utility.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A chimeric sequence detection utility, compatible with near-full length Sanger sequences and shorter 454-FLX sequences. It involves the different series of steps that operate to flag chimeric 16S rRNA sequences.To run it, you need NAST-formatted sequences generated by the included NAST-iEr utility.
